# DagsterPlusToSiemJobComponent

Compound op job: pull Dagster+ events (audit-log/runs/asset-events) → optionally normalize → ship to SIEM (Splunk/Sentinel/Datadog/Sumo/S3) on cron.

## What this builds
A Dagster `dg.job` (no asset materialized) that runs three ops on cron:

1. **fetch** — calls Dagster+ GraphQL with the chosen `event_type`
2. **normalize** — maps to OCSF or ECS schema (or pass-through)
3. **ship** — POSTs to the chosen SIEM

All in one YAML — no glue Python.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `job_name` | `str` | Dagster job name |
| `endpoint_url` | `str` | Dagster+ GraphQL endpoint — US: 'https://<org>.dagster.cloud/<deployment>/graphql', EU: 'https://<org>.eu.dagster.cloud/<deployment>/graphql' |
| `sink` | `str` | splunk \| sentinel \| datadog_logs \| sumo_logic \| s3 |

### Execution

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `page_size` | `int` | `100` | Per-page limit (max 100 for Dagster+ audit log) |

### Sensor configuration

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `default_status` | `str` | `"STOPPED"` | STOPPED \| RUNNING |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `schedule` | `str` | — | Cron (None = no schedule) |
| `user_token_env` | `str` | `"DAGSTER_PLUS_USER_TOKEN"` | — |
| `event_type` | `str` | `"audit_log"` | audit_log \| runs \| asset_events |
| `query` | `str` | — | Custom GraphQL query — overrides the default for the chosen event_type |
| `result_path` | `str` | — | Override JSON path to records (defaults match the event_type) |
| `lookback_minutes` | `int` | `15` | Stop pagination once entry timestamps fall outside this window |
| `event_types` | `list[str]` | — | AuditLog event-type codes (e.g. ['LOG_IN']) |
| `user_emails` | `list[str]` | — | Filter to events by these user emails |
| `deployment_names` | `list[str]` | — | Filter to events from these deployment names |
| `timestamp_field` | `str` | `"timestamp"` | Entry field used for the lookback cutoff |
| `normalize_to` | `str` | `"ocsf"` | ocsf \| ecs \| none |
| `sink_config` | `dict` | `dict()` | Sink-specific config — see README |
| `fail_on_zero_events` | `bool` | `false` | — |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Validate the GraphQL query
Default queries are best-guess. Inspect your Dagster+ GraphQL playground and
override via `query` + `result_path` if field names differ.

## Sinks supported
splunk | sentinel | datadog_logs | sumo_logic | s3

For Splunk: `sink_config.hec_url`, `hec_token_env`, optional `index`/`sourcetype`.
For Sentinel: `sink_config.workspace_id`, `workspace_key_env`, optional `log_type`.
For Datadog: `sink_config.api_key_env`, optional `site`/`service`.
For Sumo: `sink_config.collector_url_env`.
For S3: `sink_config.bucket`, optional `prefix`/`region_name`.
